title: October 1
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 1''' is the 274th day of the year (275th in leap years). There are 91 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1920|1920]] – [[Margaret Towner]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Natalia Nogulich]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Joe Schreiber]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Kristian Harloff]] is born.
*1980 – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 136|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 136]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Josh Brener]] is born.
*[[1987]] – [[Michaela Coel]] is born.
*1987 – ''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]'' published.
*[[1992]] – ''[[Star Wars: From Concept to Screen to Collectible]]'' published.
*[[1993]] – [[Tales of the Jedi 1|''Tales of the Jedi'' 1]] published.
*1993 – [[Classic Star Wars 13|''Classic Star Wars'' 13]] published.
*1993 – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Planet Tatooine]]'' published.
*[[1994]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]] published.
*1994 – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 3|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 3]] is published.
*1994 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 1|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 1]] published.
*1994 – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Rebel Forces]]'' published.
*[[1995]] – [[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] published.
*1995 – [[Heir to the Empire 1|''Heir to the Empire'' 1]] published.
*1995 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 5|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 5]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] paperback published.
*1996 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 13|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 13]] published.
*1996 – [[Shadows of the Empire 6|''Shadows of the Empire'' 6]] published.
*1996 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 9|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 9]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*1997 – [[Star Wars Kids (1997) 2|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997) 2]] published.
*1997 – ''[[Star Wars: Masters of Teräs Käsi]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation|PlayStation]] platform.
*1997 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 2: Escape from Thyferra]]'' published.
*1997 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 23|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 23]] published.
*1997 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Bounty]]'' published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 14: The Monsters of Dweem]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 2: The Bartokk Assassins]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Episode I]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Episode I Adventures 14: Podrace to Freedom]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Ted Burnett]] dies.
*2001 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Death of Hope]]'' published.
*2001 – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]'' eBook published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' published.
*2002 – [[Star Wars Insider 62|''Star Wars Insider'' 62]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars Tales 17|''Star Wars Tales'' 17]] published.
*[[2004]] – "[[The Final Exit]]" archived to [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*2004 – Junior novels for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope (junior novelization)|''Episodes IV'']], ''[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back (junior novelization)|V]]'', and ''[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi (junior novelization)|VI]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Creating the Worlds of Star Wars: 365 Days]]'' published.
*2005 – ''[[Dressing a Galaxy: The Costumes of Star Wars]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – "[[Sphere of Influence]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader: A 3-D Reconstruction Log]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol (article)|''The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol'']] republished on [[Unbound Worlds|Suvudu]].
*[[2013]] – ''[[The Making of Return of the Jedi]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars: Darth Maul — Son of Dathomir (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Darth Maul—Son of Dathomir'' trade paperback]] published.
*2014 – ''[[Star Wars Volume 3: Rebel Girl]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Ian Liston]] dies.
*2016 – "[[The Holocrons of Fate]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Forces of Destiny: Volume 1]]'' published.
*2017 – "[[Newest Recruit]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2018]] – [[Carlos Ezquerra]] dies.
*[[2019]] – [[Dooku: Jedi Lost (script)|''Dooku: Jedi Lost'' script]] published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Be More Lando]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Be More Leia]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Creatures Big & Small]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[The Skywalker Saga]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[The Star Wars Book]]'' published as an ebook.
*[[2021]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Terrifying Tales]]'' premiered on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – [[The High Republic: Beware the Nameless (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Beware the Nameless'' audiobook]] released.
*[[2025]] – [[Star Wars (2025) 6|''Star Wars'' (2025) 6]] published.
